name: HMS Bretwalda (FY 266)
events: 23 Feb 1941 HMS H 50 (Lt. M. Willmott, RN) conducted exercises off Tobermory with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J. Windram, RNR) and another vessl [unable to read the name in the log of HMS H 50]. (1)
26 Feb 1941 HMS H 50 (Lt. M. Willmott, RN) conducted exercises off Tobermory with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J. Windram, RNR) and HMS Violet (Lt.Cdr. K.M. Nicholson, RNR). (1)
2 Mar 1941 HMS H 50 (Lt. P.R.H. Harrison, DSC, RN) conducted exercises off Tobermory with HMS Alisma (A/Lt.Cdr. M.G. Rose, RANVR) and HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J. Windram, RNR). (2)
29 May 1941 HMS H 32 (Lt. B.G. Heslop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS L' Atlantique and HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J. Windram, RNR). (3)

6 Sep 1944 HMS H 43 (Lt. W.P. McLoughlin, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Spaniel and HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR). (86)
25 Sep 1944 HMS Unshaken (Lt. J.S. Pearce, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown together with HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) and HMS Bretwalda (Ch.Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR). (87)

13 Oct 1944 While en-route from Campbeltown to the exercise area HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) is rammed by HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR). The next morning, during a dive, minor damage to the Starboard propeller and the pressure hull is discovered. Arrangements were made for repairs.
After being rammed O 15 continued to the exercise area and conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (Lt.Cdr. J.M. Lycett, DSC, RNR) and HMS Valena (T/Lt. H. Trefusis, RNVR). (88)
13 Oct 1944 HMS Upshot (Lt. H.W. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR) and HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR). (89)
16 Oct 1944 HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR) and HMS L' Atlantique (Skr. C.A. Collins, RNR). (88)
17 Oct 1944 HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Bretwalda and HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) H.T. Pitt, RN). (88)
19 Oct 1944 HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. R.W. Denny, RNR) and HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) H.T. Pitt, RN). (88)
23 Oct 1944 HMS H 50 (Lt. W.T.J. Fox, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS L' Atlantique (Skr. C.A. Collins, RNR) and HMS Bretwalda (Skr. J.B. Henderson, RNR). (90)

27 Oct 1944 HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) departed Rothesay for the exercise area off Campbeltown. There she conducted A/S exercises with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. R.W. Denny, RNR) and HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) H.T. Pitt, RN). Upon completion of the exercises O 15 went to Campbeltown. (88)
29 Oct 1944 HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Bretwalda (Skr. R.W. Denny, RNR) and HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) H.T. Pitt, RN). (88)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
